messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## CI/CD Pipeline

### GitHub Actions

```yaml
name: Terraform
on: [push]

jobs:
  terraform:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: hashicorp/setup-terraform@v2
      - run: terraform init
      - run: terraform fmt -check
      - run: terraform validate
      - run: terraform plan
      - run: terraform apply -auto-approve
```

### OCI Resource Manager

```bash
# Create stack
oci resource-manager stack create \
  --compartment-id $COMPARTMENT \
  --config-source terraform.zip

# Apply
oci resource-manager job create \
  --stack-id $STACK_ID \
  --operation APPLY
```

### Best Practices

- Separate plan/apply
- Require approval
- Lock state
- Audit logs
